ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Proof Of Payment Of The Filing Fees
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Continued To Aug-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.
An Order to Appear will be issued to the Successor Trustee and to Mr. Lopin to appear on August 3, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the proof of payment of filing fees has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Proof Of Payment Of The Filing Fees

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Proof Of Payment Of The Filing Fees
Off Calendar Apr-22-2015 Continued To Jun-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Petitioner Sole Surviving Trustee, And For Distribution Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Loren Lopin for Robbin Wrablewski.

Mr. Lopin stated that he has heard nothing from anyone objecting, and no one plans to object. The Court granted the petition for order appointing petitioner sole surviving trustee, and for distribution of trust property (subject to review and receipt of the order) and subject to the condition of payment of previously waived filing fees which are to be paid out of escrow. Mr. Lopin is to provide a revised order which is to include said condition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/ Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton. (Not Reported)
